prompt:
Use case: background-extraction
Asset type: near-foreground occlusion cutout for scene 1 of a 16:9 Chinese paper-collage animation
Input images: Image 1 is the approved style sample and defines bamboo shape, paper texture and muted palette
Primary request: two sparse drooping bamboo-paper branches entering from the upper-right and lower-left corners, framing the image without covering the center or subtitle area
Style/medium: handcrafted cut-paper bamboo leaves, visible fibers, restrained ink, deep muted teal
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background
Constraints: uniform key background with no shadow, gradient or texture; no #ff00ff in leaves; complete crisp silhouettes; no people, text, watermark, logo
Avoid: dense border, photoreal foliage, glossy 3D
